pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 8-9 define OUTPUT_DIR and OUTPUT_FILE; export_result.sh line 6 uses OUTPUT_FILE=/home/ga/Documents/radiology_summary.png

SOURCES.txt line 4 lists 'CT Cranium (ct_cranium / 0051)'; setup_invesalius.sh line 70 defines CRANIUM_DIR=$SAMPLE_ROOT/ct_cranium; line 73 URL is https://github.com/invesalius/invesalius3/releases/download/v3.0/0051.zip; URL verified to exist via HTTP HEAD request (302 redirect, file size 24.3MB)

Task description (task.json line 5) states 'Change the background color of the 3D visualization panel to WHITE'; verifier.py VERIFICATION_PROMPT (lines 31-32) confirms requirement 'Is the background color WHITE (or very light grey)? It should NOT be black, blue, or a gradient.'

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real CT Cranium DICOM dataset (case 0051) from the official InVesalius 3.0 GitHub release at https://github.com/invesalius/invesalius3/releases/download/v3.0/0051.zip. The output is expected at /home/ga/Documents/radiology_summary.png with a minimum file size of 50KB. The task requires a white background for the 3D visualization panel and a 4-panel layout view (Axial, Sagittal, Coronal, and 3D reconstruction).
